hero_subtitle: SFTY helps exchanges connect risk data, sanctions screening, and case management into a single workflow for consistent enhanced due diligence and audit-ready compliance review.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Enhanced due diligence lacks consistent structure
problem_description: Exchanges face challenges connecting multiple risk signals, screening results and case data into a clear EDD workflow. This causes delays, manual effort and gaps in audit-ready evidence for high-risk customer and counterparty reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects risk signals, screening results and case data into one audit-ready workflow, enabling exchanges to manage high-risk customer reviews with consistent evidence and streamlined operational control.
workflow_title: From alerts to enhanced due diligence cases
workflow_description: SFTY routes risk alerts through structured reviews, opening EDD cases with evidence collection and decision logs for comprehensive exchange compliance oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented reviews. Structured EDD control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects provider outputs into decision-ready workflows, cases, evidence and reporting to help exchanges maintain clearer, audit-ready enhanced due diligence processes.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports exchanges in structuring enhanced due diligence with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and secure enterprise deployment from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support enhanced due diligence workflows for exchanges
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how exchange EDD case workflows connect providers
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports enhanced due diligence reviews

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for exchange compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a compliance control layer for exchanges, connecting onboarding, screening, monitoring, case management and reporting into a connected workflow to support AML and EDD operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support enhanced due diligence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures enhanced due diligence by consolidating provider outputs, applying internal risk policies, routing case reviews, recording decisions and preserving evidence for higher-risk customers and counterparties.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, provider results and supporting evidence to maintain audit-ready records that support regulatory review and internal investigations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate our existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, screening and Travel Rule providers, orchestrating their outputs into one controlled compliance workflow without replacing underlying systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace onboarding or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing onboarding and screening providers by integrating their outputs into structured compliance workflows and audit-ready evidence packages.
final_title: Structure enhanced due diligence with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects risk data, sanctions screening and case evidence into structured EDD workflows for exchanges.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
